diagrams.title: While Loop Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows how while loop checks condition first before executing body
elements: Start → Condition Check (True/False) → Body → Back to Condition → End (when False)
Flow arrow showing condition at top, body below, return arrow back to condition

diagrams.title: Do-While Loop Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows body executes before condition check
elements: Start → Body → Condition Check (True/False) → Back to Body (if True) → End (when False)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize that body runs at least once regardless of condition

diagrams.title: For Loop Structure
diagrams.description: Three-part for loop showing initialization, condition, and update
elements: Arrows connecting them in sequence, body in middle
diagrams.purpose: Remember the three components and their order

diagrams.title: Break vs Continue Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how break exits loop and continue skips iteration
elements: Break: Arrow pointing OUT of loop box
Continue: Curved arrow from body back to top of loop

diagrams.title: Nested Loop Execution
diagrams.description: Visualize inner loop completing for each outer iteration
elements: Outer loop box containing inner loop box
diagrams.purpose: Understand how nested loops work sequentially
